zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Lister I於大約1464年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯本時，他的父親Christopher de Lister31歲，母親Joan Calverley23歲。他於1485年與Isabel de Cliderow在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1550年在英國享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Lister I于大约1464年出生在英国英格兰越可爾吉斯本时，他的父亲Christopher de Lister31岁，母亲Joan Calverley23岁。他于1485年与Isabel de Cliderow在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1550年在英国享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lister
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer of cloth, Middle English li(te)ster, a derivative of Middle English lit(t)en (Old Norse lita) ‘to dye’. This term was used principally in East Anglia and northern and eastern England (areas of Scandinavian settlement), and to this day the surname is found principally in these regions, especially in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Lester
meanings: English: habitational name from Leicester, which is recorded as Ligeraceastre in the 10th century. The placename derives from an Old English folk name Legore ‘the dwellers by the river Legor (a lost river name)’ + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lestre in Normandy.
English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .

variants.name: Lyster
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Ljøsta in Romsdal, probably derived from Old Norse ljóstr ‘fishing spear, leister’.
Danish: nickname originally from Bornholm, derived from a word for a fishing tackle for catching eel.

variants.name: Lidster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

variants.name: Litster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Lister I was born about 1464, in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Christopher de Lister, was 31 and his mother, Joan Calverley, was 23. He married Isabel de Cliderow in 1485, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1550, in England, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Lister I est né environ 1464, à Gisburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Christopher de Lister, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Calverley, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Cliderow en 1485, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1550, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Lister I um 1464 in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Christopher de Lister 31 und seine Mutter Joan Calverley 23. Er hat 1485 in England Isabel de Cliderow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1550 im Alter von 88 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Lister I è nato il circa 1464 nel Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Christopher de Lister, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan Calverley, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Cliderow nel 1485, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1550, nel England, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Lister Iが約1464年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアギスブルンで生まれた時，父Christopher de Listerは31歳，母Joan Calverleyは23歳であった。1485年にイギリスでIsabel de Cliderowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1550年にイギリスで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Lister I(이)가 대략 1464년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지스번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christopher de Lister(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Calverley(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1485년 영국에서 Isabel de Cliderow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1550년 영국에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Lister I nasceu aproximadamente 1464, em Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Christopher de Lister, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan Calverley, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Cliderow em 1485, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1550, em Inglaterra, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Lister I родился около 1464 г. в местности гисбурн, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Christopher de Lister было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Calverley, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Cliderow в 1485 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1550 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 88 лет.

Se casó con Isabel de Cliderow en 1485, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1550, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años.
